build.buildCommand: cd /app && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && cd /app/packages/backend && npx convex deploy --cmd 'cd /app/apps/web && pnpm run build' --cmd-url-env-var-name NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL && cp -r /app/apps/web/public /app/apps/web/.next/standalone/apps/web/public && cp -r /app/apps/web/.next/static /app/apps/web/.next/standalone/apps/web/.next/static
